generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HokuyoLidarPointCloud
]

instance HokuyoLidarPointCloud : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance HokuyoLidarPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoLidarPointCloud
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for visual data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraData
]

instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance DepthCameraImageData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth and RGB image data from Intel D435i camera"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterTrackingModel
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed sensor for measuring current speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedData
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataValue : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time vehicle speed data in km/h"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlLogic
]

instance VehicleSteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle steering angle sensor for measuring current steering angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleData
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSteeringAngleSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleDataValue : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time steering angle data in degrees"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlLogic
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for high-performance computing on Jetson devices"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for inter-process communication in distributed system"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 programming language for scripting and data processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for high-performance system components"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud processing and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for structured data storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for clustering LiDAR point clouds"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance KalmanFilterTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking and state estimation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance ACCControlLogic : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant ACC control logic for adaptive cruise control"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance ClusteredPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance ClusteredPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Clustered point cloud data from DBSCAN processing"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ClusteredPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterTrackingModel
]

instance ObjectTracksDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ClusteredPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object tracks data from Kalman filter processing"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTracksDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringService
]

instance SQLVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured vehicle state and object track data stored in SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataValue, SteeringAngleDataValue, ObjectTracksData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringService
]

instance CaseBasedRequirementsDefinition : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Requirements defined via case-based generalization"
]

instance ISO23247ReferenceArchitecture : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 Reference Architecture adapted for system design"
]

instance PublicDocumentation : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Publicly available source code and documentation"
    DTDFVocab:provides DocumentationInsight
]

instance DocumentationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Access to source code and documentation for system development"
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for speed control via voltage commands"
]

instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo for angle adjustment"
]

instance AutonomousVehicleSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "1/10th-scale autonomous vehicle retrofitted from Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium teleoperated vehicle"
    base:contains NVIDIAJetsonNX, NVIDIAOrinNano, HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, VedderElectronicSpeedController, SteeringServo, VehicleSpeedSensor, VehicleSteeringAngleSensor
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonNX : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson NX microcomputer for processing"
]

instance NVIDIAOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Orin Nano microcomputer for processing"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity on vehicle"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity on cloud/vehicle"
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Entity for operator interaction"
]

instance CrossSystemEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cross-System Entity for inter-system communication"
]

instance ROS2DeploymentEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Deployment of ROS2 packages across multiple entities"
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity, CrossSystemEntity
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization and reporting of vehicle state and object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateDataInsight, ObjectTracksInsight, ProjectedPathInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloading ACC system computation to Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCControlAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote control of ACC system via UI (enable/disable, set speed, emergency braking)"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance VehicleStateDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time vehicle speed and steering angle data visualization"
]

instance ObjectTracksInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected object tracks from LiDAR and camera data"
]

instance ProjectedPathInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projected path of the vehicle based on ACC logic"
]

instance ACCControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic control of ACC system based on computed data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable ACC system via UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable ACC system via UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set desired speed for ACC system via UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Initiate emergency braking via UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Transmission of ACC control commands including desired speed converted to motor voltage, steering adjustments, and emergency braking signals to the physical vehicle."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "End-to-end latency ≤100 ms and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms for real-time operations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated entities: Physical Twin Entity (sensors/actuators), Digital Twin Entity (ACC, data processing), User Entity (3D visualization and control panel), Cross-System Entity (Data Translation FE), communicating via ROS2 intra-entity and Wi-Fi inter-entity."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase for real-time monitoring and control, and design phase for cyber-physical experimentation and requirement validation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 network for intra-entity communication; Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication with ≤100 ms latency; Data Translation FE handles serialization and unit conversion."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Hybrid deployment: Physical Twin Entity on vehicle-mounted Jetson hardware; Digital Twin Entity components in cloud for computation offloading."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture adopted for digital twin development."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical system design with latency constraints; no explicit security measures detailed in document."
]
